appShell.desktopOnly: This feature is only available in the Electron desktop app
appShell.selectWorkspaceDesc: Your notes, diary, and knowledge graph live in this folder
appShell.workspaceChatHint: Each workspace keeps its own Agent chat history. Switching folders loads that workspace's messages.

acpRedirect: This command is handled by the Agent chat panel (ACP). Use slash commands in the right panel, e.g. /today, /context. Built-in Legacy AI has been removed.

settings.title: Settings
settings.vaultApiHint: Expose workspace HTTP API on localhost for Claude Desktop / Cursor MCP bridge scripts.
settings.calendarPlaceholder: Select .ics file, or leave empty to scan workspace
settings.calendarHint: Import an iCalendar (.ics) file. Today's event count appears in the status bar.
settings.mobileReaderLanHint: On the same WiFi, open the URL below in your phone browser, or scan the QR code.
settings.mobileReaderLanEmpty: No LAN IP detected. Connect to WiFi and enable LAN access.
settings.mobileReaderLanPending: Click Save to apply LAN access
settings.mobileReaderSaveToConnect: Your phone cannot connect until the service is running. Enable Vault API, click Save, then wait for the green running status.
settings.mobileReaderFirewallHint: If the phone still cannot connect, allow Metamates or TCP port 17333 in Windows Firewall (Private network).
settings.vaultApiNotRunning: Vault API is not running. Click Save to start it.
settings.vaultApiNoWorkspace: Open a workspace before enabling Vault API
settings.vaultApiLanHint: Allow LAN access (phone on same WiFi can capture; trusted networks only)
settings.ollamaHint: When enabled, Agent panel can use local Ollama (requires Ollama running).
settings.cliAgentsHint: Install or remove Gemini, Claude, CodeBuddy, etc.
settings.syncCliSkillsHint: Fill missing slash skills per CLI layout (e.g. .qwen/skills/, .gemini/skills/). Existing files are not overwritten.
settings.mcpHint: Enabled MCP servers are injected on ACP connect. Vault bridge is added when Vault API is on.
settings.mcpReconnectHint: Agent sessions reloaded to apply MCP/Vault changes

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.hint: Try refreshing or restarting the app. If it persists, check the console logs.
